zh.lifeSummary: 當Imagina van Loon-Rieneck於大約1145年出生在比利時利艾利布格時，她的父親Lodewijk I van Loon37歲，母親Agnes de Metz32歲。她和Godfried III van Leuven-Brabant hertog van Neder-Lotharingen至少有2個兒子。她去世於1214年6月5日享年70歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Imagina van Loon-Rieneck于大约1145年出生在比利时利艾利布格时，她的父亲Lodewijk I van Loon37岁，母亲Agnes de Metz32岁。她和Godfried III van Leuven-Brabant hertog van Neder-Lotharingen至少有2个儿子。她去世于1214年6月5日享年70岁。

nameMeanings.name: van
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Anh, Thanh, Hung, Minh, Vinh, Dung, Hue, Huong, Lan, Quang, Tan, Thuy, Hong, Chi, Hang, Ho, Pok, Sang, Bai, Chin, Ching, Chu, Chuan, Dong.
Vietnamese (Vạn): from the Chinese surname 萬, see Wan 1.
Vietnamese (Văn): from the Chinese surnames 文 or 聞, see Wen 2 and 3, and also 5 below.

variants.name: Wan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Hong, Yi, Qi, Qiang, Wai, Yiu, Yuk, Chien-Min, Fang, Hin, Jichun, Li, Man, Chung, Min, Yiping, Pak, Sik, Sung Man.  Vietnamese Tin, Bang, Da, Hien, Hoi, Lan, Minh Quang, Sau, Tich, Tung, Yaping, Yuet.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 萬, which means ‘ten thousand’ literally or ‘very great number’ figuratively: (i) from the personal name of Bi Wan (畢萬), an official in the state of Jin (located in present-day Shanxi province). He was said to be a descendant of Bi Gong Gao (known as Duke of Bi), the 15th son of the virtuous King Wen of Zhou (reined 1152–1056  BC ). Bi Wan was later granted the fiefdom of Wei (魏), which in 403  BC  became the state of Wei (located in present-day Shanxi, Shaanxi, Henan and Hebei provinces). Some of his descendants adopted Wei (魏) as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his personal name, as their surname. (ii) from the personal name Wan (萬), style name of Rui Bo (芮伯, the Earl of Rui), an official of the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771  BC ), who was granted the fief Rui (located in Ruicheng in Shaanxi province). Some of his descendants inherited Rui (芮), the name of the fief, as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his style name, as their surname. (iii) from the placename Wan (萬), the name of a fief (located in Juxian in Shandong province) granted during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ) to an official in the ancient state of Chu. (iv) from the first element of the name of the Wan Si (萬俟) family, who lived in the downstream areas of the Yellow River during the Northern Qi dynasty (550–577  AD ). (v) from the second element of the name of the Tu Wan (吐萬) family, who are members of the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 完, meaning ‘complete’ in Chinese: (i) said to be borne by the descendants of Huan Zhui, a grandson of the Duke Huan of Song (ruler of the state of Song, died 651  BC ). (ii) from Wan (完), the name of Qu Wan (屈完), an official in the state of Chu during the Spring and Autumn Period (770–476  BC ). (iii) shortened form of the compound surname Wan-Yan (完顔), a surname from minority ethnic groups such as Juchen ethnic group in ancient northern China.

en.lifeSummary: When Imagina van Loon-Rieneck was born about 1145, in Limbourg, Liège, Belgium, her father, Lodewijk I van Loon, was 37 and her mother, Agnes de Metz, was 32. She had at least 2 sons with Godfried III van Leuven-Brabant hertog van Neder-Lotharingen. She died on 5 June 1214, at the age of 70.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Imagina van Loon-Rieneck est née environ 1145, à Limbourg, Liège, Belgique, son père, Lodewijk I van Loon, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Agnes de Metz, avait 32 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils avec Godfried III van Leuven-Brabant hertog van Neder-Lotharingen. Elle est décédée le 5 juin 1214, à l’âge de 70 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Imagina van Loon-Rieneck um 1145 in Limbourg, Lüttich, Belgien geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Lodewijk I van Loon 37 und ihre Mutter Agnes de Metz 32. Sie hatte mit Godfried III van Leuven-Brabant hertog van Neder-Lotharingen mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb am 5. Juni 1214 im Alter von 70 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Imagina van Loon-Rieneck è nata il circa 1145 nel Limbourg, Liegi, Belgio, sua padre, Lodewijk I van Loon, aveva 37 anni e sua madre, Agnes de Metz, aveva 32 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figli con Godfried III van Leuven-Brabant hertog van Neder-Lotharingen. Morì il 5 giugno 1214, all'età di 70 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Imagina van Loon-Rieneckが約1145年にベルギーリeッジリンボウルグで生まれた時，父Lodewijk I van Loonは37歳，母Agnes de Metzは32歳であった。彼女はGodfried III van Leuven-Brabant hertog van Neder-Lotharingenとの間に少なくとも2人の息子をもうけた。彼女は1214年6月5日に70歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Imagina van Loon-Rieneck(이)가 대략 1145년 벨기에 리e지 림보우르그에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Lodewijk I van Loon(은)는 37세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes de Metz(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 Godfried III van Leuven-Brabant hertog van Neder-Lotharingen(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1214년 6월 5일 70세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Imagina van Loon-Rieneck nasceu aproximadamente 1145, em Limbourg, Liège, Bélgica, seu pai, Lodewijk I van Loon, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Agnes de Metz, tinha 32 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhos com Godfried III van Leuven-Brabant hertog van Neder-Lotharingen. Ela faleceu em 5 de junho de 1214, com 70 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Imagina van Loon-Rieneck родилась около 1145 г. в местности лимбург, лиeдж, Бельгия, её отцу по имени Lodewijk I van Loon было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes de Metz, 32. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына от Godfried III van Leuven-Brabant hertog van Neder-Lotharingen. Она умерла 5 июня 1214 г. в возрасте 70 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Imagina van Loon-Rieneck nació aproximadamente 1145, en Limbourg, Lieja, Bélgica, su papá, Lodewijk I van Loon, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Agnes de Metz, tenía 32 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos con Godfried III van Leuven-Brabant hertog van Neder-Lotharingen. Murió el 5 de junio de 1214, a la edad de 70 años.
